name: copilot-optimizer-ai
description: Get better Copilot answers automatically. Fix prompts. Improve answers. Learn over time.

chatParticipants.name: optimizer
chatParticipants.description: Rewrites your prompt for accuracy, sends it to the model, and learns from the real response.

commands.name: raw
commands.description: Bypass optimization — send your prompt unchanged (A/B compare)

copilotOptimizer.tokenBudget.markdownDescription: Maximum tokens for the optimized prompt. **Lower** = more token savings (more aggressive compression). **Higher** = more accuracy (more context retained). Since the optimizer now talks to the model directly, an accuracy-first default is recommended.

copilotOptimizer.enabled.markdownDescription: Master on/off switch for prompt optimization in the `@optimizer` chat participant. When off, prompts are passed through unchanged. Can also be toggled from the status bar.

copilotOptimizer.contextFiles.markdownDescription: How many of the top-ranked workspace files to read and attach (as real code, not just names) to the prompt sent to the model. Set to `0` to attach file names only.

copilotOptimizer.contextCharBudget.markdownDescription: Maximum total characters of attached file content sent to the model. Larger = more code context (more accurate) but more tokens used.

copilotOptimizer.model.markdownDescription: Preferred Copilot model family for `@optimizer` to send to (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `o1`, `claude-3.5-sonnet`). Leave empty to use the model selected in the chat dropdown, or the first available model. If the requested family isn't available, the optimizer falls back automatically.
